residual_risks.note:
The primary render path (renderTiptapToHtml) passes output through DOMPurify before returning. The fallback path in render-body.ts wraps each line in escapeHtml() before placing it inside

tags, so raw user text never reaches {@html} unsanitized. Both paths satisfy CLAUDE.md Security Boundaries: '{@html} opts out of XSS protection. Every use requires manual sanitization.'

render-body.ts is called from prompt-query.ts which runs server-side. The console.error on the catch branch is explicitly permitted by CLAUDE.md: 'Use console.error for operational errors; remove debug console.log before committing.' No console.log present.
